news.headline: GM announces new gas-powered Cadillac vehicles amid EV pullback
news.summary: GM CEO Mary Barra said Tuesday the next-generation Cadillacs will include new versions of the CT5 sedan, XT5 midsize SUV and discontinued three-row XT6 SUV.

news.headline: GM earnings & outlook impressed, thanks to lower tariffs. But don't get too comfortable.
news.summary: General Motors (GM) raised its 2026 outlook by $500 million, thanks in part to better margins and lower tariffs. Morning Brief host Julie Hyman discusses more with Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conle

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $706.12 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $746.04 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor calls / long delta.
Use QQQ $706.12 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AAPL CALL — enter $9.65–$10.67, target $15.24+, stop $6.10.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +1.45% and SPY +0.53%. Composite sentiment +54 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d), vix. VIX at 13.75 (-2.5%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta. Financials (+5.76%) is leading while Communication (-0.31%) lags. Premarket strength in COIN, AMD; weakness in AMZN, GOOGL. The desk's highest-conviction setup is AAPL (8.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
